creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
I would argue that some logic in portclippy needs to be reworked for both readability and consistentcy with the rest of the tree but oh well, it's your port.

We expect users to read UPDATING and it's common practice unless we version each variant.

See shell/ksh* www/bareos* www/dolibarr* www/grafana* www/py-tornado* net/haproxy* etc
